title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 300.300 - Following emergency vehicle prohibited
text:
300.300.  Following emergency vehicle prohibited. — The driver of any vehicle other than one on official business shall not follow any emergency vehicle traveling in response to an emergency call closer than five hundred feet or drive into or park such vehicle within the block where fire apparatus has stopped in answer to a fire alarm.
(L. 1965 p. 445 § 61, A.L. 2002 H.B. 1270 and H.B. 2032)
